title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
description: The application constructs an SQL query using external input without proper sanitization, allowing an attacker to manipulate the query logic.

title: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
description: The application includes untrusted data in a web page without proper encoding, allowing an attacker to execute malicious scripts in the victim's browser.

title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
description: The application fetches a URL provided by a user without validating the destination, allowing an attacker to make requests to internal or unauthorized servers.
